nm:output.nm:control_stream: $PROBLEM RcppNM bench adv1_trans2 ADVAN=1 TRANS=2 $SUBROUTINE ADVAN1 TRANS2 $INPUT ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II $DATA data.csv IGNORE=@ $THETA (0.1, 1, 10) ; CL (1, 10, 100) ; V $OMEGA 0.09 $SIGMA 0.1 $PK CL = THETA(1) * exp(ETA(1)) V = THETA(2) $ERROR Y = F * (1 + ERR(1)) $EST METHOD=1 INTER MAXEVAL=9999 PRINT=1 NOABORT $COVAR PRINT=E
nm:output.nm:nmtran:
WARNINGS AND ERRORS (IF ANY) FOR PROBLEM 1
(WARNING 2) NM-TRAN INFERS THAT THE DATA ARE POPULATION.
(WARNING 23) $PK DOES NOT DEFINE A SCALE PARAMETER FOR THE CENTRAL COMPARTMENT. WITH THIS TRANS, IT MAY NOT BE POSSIBLE TO SEPARATELY OBTAIN ESTIMATES OF PARAMETERS AFFECTING CLEARANCE AND VOLUME.

nm:nonmem.nm:license_information: License Registered to: Leiden Academic Center for Drug Research Expiration Date: 14 JAN 2028 Current Date: 24 JUN 2026 Days until program expires : 570
nm:nonmem.nm:program_information: 1NONLINEAR MIXED EFFECTS MODEL PROGRAM (NONMEM) VERSION 7.3.0 ORIGINALLY DEVELOPED BY STUART BEAL, LEWIS SHEINER, AND ALISON BOECKMANN CURRENT DEVELOPERS ARE ROBERT BAUER, ICON DEVELOPMENT SOLUTIONS, AND ALISON BOECKMANN. IMPLEMENTATION, EFFICIENCY, AND STANDARDIZATION PERFORMED BY NOUS INFOSYSTEMS.

nm:problem.nm:problem_information:
PROBLEM NO.: 1 RcppNM bench adv1_trans2 ADVAN=1 TRANS=2 0DATA CHECKOUT RUN: NO DATA SET LOCATED ON UNIT NO.: 2 THIS UNIT TO BE REWOUND: NO NO. OF DATA RECS IN DATA SET: 70 NO. OF DATA ITEMS IN DATA SET: 9 ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 1 DEP VARIABLE IS DATA ITEM NO.: 3 MDV DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 5 0INDICES PASSED TO SUBROUTINE PRED: 6 2 4 0 8 9 7 0 0 0 0 0LABELS FOR DATA ITEMS: ID TIME DV AMT MDV EVID CMT SS II 0FORMAT FOR DATA: (E2.0,E5.0,E9.0,E4.0,4E2.0,E3.0)
TOT. NO. OF OBS RECS: 62 TOT. NO. OF INDIVIDUALS: 6 0LENGTH OF THETA: 2 0DEFAULT THETA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0OMEGA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 1 0DEFAULT OMEGA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0SIGMA HAS SIMPLE DIAGONAL FORM WITH DIMENSION: 1 0DEFAULT SIGMA BOUNDARY TEST OMITTED: NO 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF THETA: LOWER BOUND INITIAL EST UPPER BOUND 0.1000E+00 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0.1000E+01 0.1000E+02 0.1000E+03 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF OMEGA: 0.9000E-01 0INITIAL ESTIMATE OF SIGMA: 0.1000E+00 0COVARIANCE STEP OMITTED: NO EIGENVLS. PRINTED: YES SPECIAL COMPUTATION: NO COMPRESSED FORMAT: NO 1DOUBLE PRECISION PREDPP VERSION 7.3.0
ONE COMPARTMENT MODEL (ADVAN1) 0MAXIMUM NO. OF BASIC PK PARAMETERS: 2 0BASIC PK PARAMETERS (AFTER TRANSLATION): ELIMINATION RATE (K) IS BASIC PK PARAMETER NO.: 1
TRANSLATOR WILL CONVERT PARAMETERS CLEARANCE (CL) AND VOLUME (V) TO K (TRANS2) 0COMPARTMENT ATTRIBUTES COMPT. NO. FUNCTION INITIAL ON/OFF DOSE DEFAULT DEFAULT STATUS ALLOWED ALLOWED FOR DOSE FOR OBS. 1 CENTRAL ON NO YES YES YES 2 OUTPUT OFF YES NO NO NO 1 ADDITIONAL PK PARAMETERS - ASSIGNMENT OF ROWS IN GG COMPT. NO. INDICES SCALE BIOAVAIL. ZERO-ORDER ZERO-ORDER ABSORB FRACTION RATE DURATION LAG 1 * * * * * 2 * - - - - - PARAMETER IS NOT ALLOWED FOR THIS MODEL * PARAMETER IS NOT SUPPLIED BY PK SUBROUTINE; WILL DEFAULT TO ONE IF APPLICABLE 0ERROR IN LOG Y IS MODELED 0DATA ITEM INDICES USED BY PRED ARE: EVENT ID DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 6 TIME DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 2 DOSE AMOUNT DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 4 STEADY STATE DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 8 INTERVAL DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 9 COMPT. NO. DATA ITEM IS DATA ITEM NO.: 7
0PK SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD. PK SUBROUTINE NOT CALLED AT NONEVENT (ADDITIONAL OR LAGGED) DOSE TIMES. 0DURING SIMULATION, ERROR SUBROUTINE CALLED WITH EVERY EVENT RECORD. OTHERWISE, ERROR SUBROUTINE CALLED ONCE IN THIS PROBLEM.

nm:estimation.nm:estimation_title: First Order Conditional Estimation with Interaction
nm:estimation.nm:termination_information: 0MINIMIZATION SUCCESSFUL HOWEVER, PROBLEMS OCCURRED WITH THE MINIMIZATION. REGARD THE RESULTS OF THE ESTIMATION STEP CAREFULLY, AND ACCEPT THEM ONLY AFTER CHECKING THAT THE COVARIANCE STEP PRODUCES REASONABLE OUTPUT. NO. OF FUNCTION EVALUATIONS USED: 78 NO. OF SIG. DIGITS IN FINAL EST.: 4.5
